name: bexio-mcp-server
description: Connect Claude Desktop to your Bexio accounting system. Manage invoices, contacts, projects, time tracking, and 300+ more tools through natural conversation.

api_token.title: Bexio API Token
api_token.description: Your Bexio API token. Get it from Bexio > Settings > API Tokens. Required for authentication.

base_url.title: API Base URL
base_url.description: Bexio API endpoint. Change only if using a custom endpoint.

enabled_categories.title: Enabled Tool Categories (optional)
enabled_categories.description: Comma-separated whitelist to reduce token usage. Example: contacts,invoices,purchase,banking. Leave empty to register all tools. Available: reference, company, banking, projects, timetracking, accounting, purchase, files, payroll, contacts, invoices, orders, quotes, payments, reminders, deliveries, items, reports, users, misc, notes, tasks, stock, docs, positions.

tools.name: list_invoices
tools.description: List invoices with pagination and filtering

tools.name: show_dashboard
tools.description: Display dashboard with invoice and contact summary

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description: Create a new invoice in Bexio
